{{Quote|Look! We're saved!|C-3PO mistakes fyrefliis for someone come to help him|<ref name="M6" />}}
'''Fyrefliis''' were a large [[Insect/Legends|insect]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bioluminescence/Legends|bioluminescent]] [[flii]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. On their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], which was frequently subject to [[Solar flare/Legends|solar flares]], the species could be found within the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]]. The [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and another member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] encountered four fyrefliis while lost in the forest in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], thinking the insects were someone who could help them. When the heroes later left Kubindi in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], they saw many fyrefliis lighting up the night sky, thousands of [[Foot/Legends|feet]] above them.<ref name="M6" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fyrefliis first appeared in ''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'', a [[1998]] novel written by [[Dave Wolverton]] as part of the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' series. They later received an entry in the [[2008]] sourcebook ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. Neither source makes clear their level of sentience. Which Hero of Yavin met them is also not clear, as the ''Missions'' books allows readers to choose one of the heroes to play as.

*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
